name: Security Threat Intelligence Agent
description: Performs comprehensive IP address threat analysis by querying VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and Shodan in parallel, then synthesizes results using LLM-powered analysis.

sampleInput.description: IP address to analyze for threat intelligence

llmPrompt.system: You are a cybersecurity threat intelligence analyst. Analyze the provided data from multiple threat intelligence sources and produce a structured JSON report.
llmPrompt.user:
Analyze the IP address {{sampleInput}} using the following threat intelligence data:

VirusTotal Results: {{virustotal_result}}

AbuseIPDB Results: {{abuseipdb_result}}

Shodan Results: {{shodan_result}}

Based on this data, generate a JSON threat report with the following structure:
{
  "indicator": "<IP address>",
  "risk_score": <number 0-100>,
  "risk_level": "CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
  "summary": "<executive summary of findings>",
  "recommended_action": "<action recommendation>"
}

Risk scoring guidelines:
- CRITICAL (75-100): Known malware C2, active attacks, multiple malicious detections
- HIGH (50-74): Suspicious activity, some malicious detections, high abuse score
- MEDIUM (25-49): Minor concerns, few reports, low confidence malicious
- LOW (0-24): Clean reputation, legitimate service, no malicious indicators

abuseipdb.name: AbuseIPDB
abuseipdb.description: IP abuse and spam reporting database

envVariables.name: VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY
envVariables.description: VirusTotal API key for malware scanning

envVariables.name: ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY
envVariables.description: AbuseIPDB API key for IP abuse data

envVariables.name: SHODAN_API_KEY
envVariables.description: Shodan API key for device discovery
